concept: Ping de identificação do portador com diamante ciano, coroa âmbar, barras laterais e pulso radial branco.
selectionRationale: Feedback de HUD específico para identificar o portador da bomba, distinto do timer/fusível, capture-lock, confirmação e streak; não depende de texto ou números e permanece separado da lógica de gameplay.
prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: high-resolution 2D sprite-sheet source for a short Bomba PvP HUD animation. Primary request: create a coherent 4x4 storyboard grid with 16 sequential frames of a bomb-carrier identity ping: a compact cyan diamond emblem appears under a small amber crown chevron, two short horizontal side bars assemble around it, the badge emits a clean white-cyan confirmation pulse, then the bars and crown retract back to the compact emblem. Each cell must contain exactly one centered frame with generous padding and identical framing, crisp readable pixel-art HUD effect, no numerals, no letters, no text and no panel. Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background, no shadow, no gradient, no texture, no floor. Subject: isolated carrier badge/ping intended for a gameplay HUD. Style/medium: crisp high-resolution pixel-art UI VFX with limited cyan-blue, amber-gold, white and deep-navy accents, hard readable edges with restrained glow. Composition/framing: square 4x4 grid, row-major temporal order, centered badge in every cell, consistent scale, 16 distinct smoothly progressing frames. Lighting/mood: readable team identity ping, confident and quick. Color palette: cyan, amber-gold, white highlight, navy accents; never use magenta in the subject. Materials/textures: luminous diamond, angular crown chevron, segmented side bars and tiny pixel motes. Constraints: keep the chroma-key background perfectly uniform; preserve a full transparent-safe margin around every frame; no text, logos, watermark, characters, bomb body, timer ring, capture reticle, streak number, flames, smoke or extra UI. Avoid: fake digits, duplicate frames, cut-off bars, circular orb-only design, empty cells and inconsistent framing.

source.resolutionNote: A geração entregue pelo image_gen é nativa em 1254x1254; source-upscaled-2048.png é somente um derivado ampliado e não uma fonte nativa 2048px.

pipeline.alphaProcessing: Helper remove_chroma_key.py com auto-key de borda, soft matte, despill e edge-contract 1; depois recorte interno de 40px e extensão transparente centralizada para impedir contato com as bordas.

grok.requestedTask: Conferir a grade 4x4, tentar extrair frames e validar alpha, ordem, timing e bordas internas.
grok.result: Invoke-GrokWorker.ps1 retornou exit code 1 após a mensagem inicial e não criou arquivos.

pipeline.fallback: Extração, atlases, contact sheet, GIF e validação concluídos localmente com ImageMagick após a remoção de halo pelo helper.

validation.visualInspection: Contact sheet inspecionado após a remoção de chroma-key; diamante, coroa, barras, pulso radial e retração permanecem legíveis sem halo magenta observável.

license: Visual gerado nesta thread; nenhum recurso externo ou pack adotado.
